CustomField.description: XSD change #139 (11/19/24) — Optional Employee_Owned field per SBA_NEXUS_Counseling-2-14.xsd. Maps to Employee_Owned XML element.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: XSD change #139 (11/19/24) — Optional Employee_Owned field. Maps to Employee_Owned XML element in 641 Counseling report.
CustomField.label: EmployeeOwned_ClientIntake
